1.premise: Growing up in Miami meant skipping conventional dating and going straight to strippers and sex workers.
Mentioning Miami implies hometown pride, not immediate stripper praise.

2.premise: Growing up around strippers can replace normal dating experience.

1.premise: Texas reduces mixed Latino identity to crude racial categories.
